message:
✨ Implement AI/ML and CI/CD dashboard data hooks (#505)

- Add real data hooks to AIML.tsx using useClusters, useGPUNodes, and useCachedLLMdModels
- Add real data hooks to CICD.tsx using useClusters, useDeployments, and useCachedProwJobs
- Fix ProwJob state property (use 'state' instead of 'status')
- Fix Deployment type (remove non-existent 'lastUpdated' property)
- Reduce card sizes to minimal (w=4, h=3) in both dashboard configs
- Calculate real stats: GPU nodes, total GPUs, ML workloads, running/failed jobs, success rate
- Show demo data indicator only when no real data is available

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
